address2: Solaire Resort & Casino 1 Asean Avenue Entertainment City, Barangay Tambo
longBusinessSummary: Bloomberry Resorts Corporation develops, owns, and operates hotels, casinos, and integrated resorts in the Philippines and Korea. The company develops tourist facilities, such as casino-entertainment complexes with casino, hotel, golf course, retail and amusement areas, and themed development components, as well as invests in agricultural land. It also owns and operates the Solaire Resort Entertainment City, a hotel and gaming resort consisting of slot machines, gaming tables, electronic table games, and specialty restaurants; hotel rooms, suites, and bayside villas; food and beverage outlets, including Chinese, Korean, Japanese, and Italian restaurants, as well as international buffet/coffee shop, noodle shop, live entertainment lounge, food court, lobby bar, and lounge area; and multilevel parking building with parking slots, a spa and fitness center, and Bayview promenade. In addition, the company owns and operates the Sky Tower, which consists of an all-suite hotel; VIP gaming salons with gaming tables and slot machines; a bar for VIP patrons; meeting rooms with meeting facilities, and boardrooms and pre-function area; a lyrical theater; the Waterside Restobar and Oasis Garden Café restaurants; shooting club with rifle shooting bays and pistol bays; and multi-level parking garage, as well as Solaire Resort North, including gaming space, guest rooms and suites, casual cafes, signature restaurants, bars and lounges, ballroom, waterpark, and indoor Kids' Club. It operates Jeju Sun Hotel & Casino, including rooms, and gaming operations with tables and electronic gaming machines, as well as food and beverage outlets, and cruise terminals. Bloomberry Resorts Corporation was formerly known as Sureste Properties Inc. and changed its name to Bloomberry Resorts Corporation in March 2012. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Paranaque City, the Philippines. Bloomberry Resorts Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Prime Strategic Holdings Inc.

companyOfficers.name: Mr. Donato C. Almeda
companyOfficers.title: Vice Chairman for Construction and Regulatory Affairs & Director
